steps.t: Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should talk to the arguing dwarves in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should talk to Igrit in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should search for signs of the goat at the stables in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should search for the missing rope in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should show the gift to Néchek in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should talk to Víglund in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. You should bring the gift to Igrit in Vérnozal.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. Prince Ingór wishes to talk to you.
Vérnozal can be found in Máttugard, by the Steepset. Prince Ingór wishes to talk to you.
